demographics.living_situation: lives at home with a caregiver present tonight

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I tried to stand up to use the bathroom and everything went black. I've never felt this weak in my life. My carer had to help me back to bed.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's late but she nearly passed out standing up and she can't keep any food or water down — we didn't think it could wait until morning.

symptom_narrative.onset: the really bad weakness came on over the last three days, but she's been sliding downhill for months
symptom_narrative.duration: worst over the past 72 hours; the tiredness has been building for months
symptom_narrative.character: totally drained, no strength at all, and sick to the stomach
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst she's ever felt — completely wiped out and can't stay upright
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over — no strength anywhere, and a vague ache in the belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now, and standing up makes the blackness and dizziness come on straight away
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying flat is the only thing that helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up or even sitting up quickly makes her go dizzy and grey
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling really sick, been vomiting, some belly pain, not able to eat or drink much for about a week
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — it's been getting worse and worse
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't get out of bed on her own, needs help to move, hasn't been able to keep fluids down

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: some pale white patches on the skin of her hands and feet that have been there a while

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an over-the-counter anti-nausea tablet she bought at the chemist

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: a caregiver is with her and is very worried about how fast she has gone downhill

objective_data_offered.value: she looks exhausted and gaunt, her lips and mouth look really dry
when she stood up she went pale and grey and nearly collapsed, and had to be helped back to bed
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: carer observation, no home blood-pressure device available to measure it

objective_data_offered.value: she has kept almost nothing down for about a day and says her mouth is very dry
